privileged_info_summary: I have completed a PI audit for the wazuh_env create_custom_decoder task. The task utilizes synthetically generated log data created directly within the setup scripts. I confirmed that the verifier correctly requires the decoder to be named "bastion-session" and filter on program name "session_auth". Additionally, I verified that the rules must use ID 100010 for failed logins and 100011 for successful logins, which are explicitly tested against the specific test_log_line metadata.
